shelters.name: Brisbane Community Hall
shelters.notes: May open during emergencies. Confirm official activation before travel.

shelters.name: Samford Showgrounds
shelters.notes: May be used as an evacuation centre or relief point during major incidents.

shelters.name: Fernvale Sports Oval
shelters.notes: Public assembly point used for local staging when larger centres are still being activated.

shelters.name: Coen Community Centre
shelters.notes: Temporary relief centre used for staged evacuations and supply coordination.

shelters.name: Derby Civic Hall
shelters.notes: Community shelter reference location for wet-season disruptions. Activation is event-dependent.

shelters.name: Alice Springs Community Centre
shelters.notes: May operate as an emergency evacuation centre during severe heat, fire, or flood events.

shelters.name: West MacDonnell Community Hall
shelters.notes: Community shelter reference point for remote travellers and nearby residents during major disruptions.

shelters.name: Townsville Cyclone Shelter
shelters.notes: Purpose-built cyclone shelter reference location. Only use when officially opened.

shelters.name: Cairns Community Centre
shelters.notes: Community shelter reference location that may support cyclone and flood evacuations.
